backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining BlogPost and Comment types with CRUD operations for blog posts, comment management, and blob storage integration using MixinStorage for image handling.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented homepage sections (hero, What We Offer, Why AyurGlow Secrets), About page updates, and blog/admin functionality with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing, pages, components, hooks, and styling with details on blog CRUD, image uploads, earth-tone color scheme, and responsive typography.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base layer with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'AyurGlow Secrets' title, root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app root with TanStack Router configuration defining all routes (home, about, categories, subcategories, blog, admin, legal) wrapped in Layout component with QueryClient provider.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Blog sidebar component with remedy search functionality, popular posts list with images, and category counts, featuring click-outside detection and keyboard navigation for search results.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: React component that displays a comment form and list of comments for a blog post, using custom hooks for fetching and adding comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a large featured blog post card with image, title, excerpt, category badge, and metadata (date, read time) with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component with brand logo, navigation links organized in columns (Quick Links, Categories, Legal), and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders Navigation, children content, and Footer in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, categories dropdown, admin link, and mobile hamburger menu with sticky positioning.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Blog post card component displaying thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and metadata (date, read time) with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Forwardable search input component with clear button and keyboard navigation support (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown).
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown search results component with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that displays matching posts with titles, categories, and keywords.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state, creating AuthClient instances, and handling identity delegation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all posts, get published posts, get single post, create, update, delete) and comment operations, using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook providing search functionality for Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering a predefined list of remedy pages by title, category, and keywords based on user search query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Ayurvedic-themed color palette using OKLCH color space, defining light and dark mode variables for earth tones, greens, and typography styles with responsive design.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings with hero section, mission statement, philosophy explanation, and service offerings in a styled layout using Ayurvedic theme colors.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, create/edit/delete actions, loading states, error handling, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid with sidebar, includes loading states, error handling, and empty state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page showing full content with featured/content images, metadata (date, read time, author), sidebar, and comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with rich text editor (ReactQuill), image uploads (featured, beginning, content images), metadata fields, and publish toggle.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing blog posts, loads post data by ID and provides same editing capabilities as CreateBlogPostPage including image management and content editing.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: React page component displaying dandruff and scalp care remedies with hero section, back navigation, and cards showing natural treatments like neem-tea tree oil, lemon-yogurt mask, fenugreek-curd pack, and aloe vera-coconut oil soother.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: React page component for grey hair solutions featuring Ayurvedic remedies including curry leaves-coconut oil infusion, amla-henna pack, black tea-coffee rinse, and bhringraj-brahmi oil treatment with ingredients, application steps, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: React page component presenting hair fall treatment remedies such as onion juice treatment, fenugreek seeds mask, amla-shikakai pack, and curry leaves-coconut oil treatment with detailed application instructions and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component showcasing hair growth remedies including castor oil-coconut oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj mask, egg-yogurt protein treatment, and hibiscus-curry leaves pack with benefits and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component displaying hair oils and masks treatments including Ayurvedic hot oil treatment, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, and neem-tulsi scalp oil with detailed preparation and application steps.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for hair care category displaying subcategories (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils/masks) as clickable cards with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React page component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedy with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

Alternative diabetes and blood pressure support page using Card components with remedies like fenugreek seeds water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon tea, and garlic-ginger remedy, featuring a hero section, back navigation, and important medical disclaimer alert.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page for digestion and gut health remedies including Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, structured with Card components, hero section with Apple icon, and back navigation to health remedies.

Digestive health remedies page featuring Triphala powder, ginger-lemon tonic, CCF tea, and ajwain water with icons (Leaf, Flame, Sun, Droplet), ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency in a grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: React page component displaying immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, and Chyawanprash with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

Immunity boosting remedies page showcasing turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea, Chyawanprash tonic, and amla-honey shot with SEO-optimized heading, icons, detailed preparation instructions, and health benefits for strengthening natural immunity.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: React page component presenting stress relief and sleep remedies like Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, and Almond-Saffron Milk with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

React page component featuring stress and sleep solutions including Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Infusion, and Warm Almond Milk with Saffron, with back navigation to health remedies section.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: React page component showcasing weight management remedies such as Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, and Cabbage-Carrot Detox Juice with ingredients, application methods, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes/BP, Stress/Sleep) in a grid with icons, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage with hero section, 'What We Offer' cards showcasing four service categories, featured post display, and recent posts grid fetched via useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page with hero section and expandable cards covering information collection, usage, cookies, third-party services, and user rights with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: React page component displaying acne and pimple treatments including Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with detailed application instructions and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: React page component displaying four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (neem-turmeric, tea tree-aloe, sandalwood-rosewater, cinnamon-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency information.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: React page component showcasing four anti-aging remedies (almond-saffron serum, avocado-honey mask, rose water-glycerin tonic, papaya-yogurt mask) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, and benefits for youthful skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: React page component presenting five DIY face pack recipes (multani mitti, besan-turmeric, oatmeal-honey, sandalwood-rose, banana-honey) categorized by skin type with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: React page component featuring four natural glow remedies (turmeric-yogurt mask, saffron-milk treatment, aloe vera-rose water toner, papaya-honey mask) with ingredients, application methods, and benefits for radiant skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: React page component displaying four remedies for pigmentation and dark spots (lemon-honey mask, potato-cucumber juice, almond-milk cream, orange peel-yogurt pack) with detailed ingredients, application steps, and benefits for skin brightening.

React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for pigmentation reduction, featuring four natural treatments (lemon-honey, potato-cucumber, saffron-milk, orange peel-yogurt) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency information.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for Skin Care category displaying five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) in a responsive grid with icons and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of Service page with medical disclaimer alert, hero section, and multiple cards covering agreement terms, website usage, intellectual property, liability limitations, and governing law.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including Ayurvedic color palette (earth-green, sage-green, gold, etc.), typography settings with Inter and Playfair Display fonts, custom spacing, shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting AyurGlow Secrets as an Ayurvedic wellness blog platform with features for health/skin/hair care content, image management, commenting system, and homepage sections showcasing natural remedies and Ayurvedic approach.
